## Summary

What changed?

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Community file
- [ ] CLI / distribution
- [ ] Workflow / skill
- [ ] Release readiness
- [ ] Other

## Public/private boundary

- [ ] No private URL, credential, personal data, or internal-only context is included.
- [ ] npm token values are not committed.
- [ ] Public npm claims are backed by official registry evidence or clearly marked as not yet verified.

## Bilingual impact

- [ ] English docs updated if user-facing concepts changed.
- [ ] 中文文档已在用户面概念变化时同步。
- [ ] Not applicable.

## Verification

Commands or checks run:

```text

```

Anything reviewers should know?
